- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands in an indoor office-like room, seen from behind while taking a photo in a mirror, with a second person visible in the background.

Main Subject:
In the foreground, a person is shown from the back and slightly to the side, standing upright and looking toward a mirror. Their dark hair is tied up, and they wear a light-colored short-sleeve T-shirt with a graphic print on the back and dark loose pants. They have a bright reflective glare and appear to be holding or positioned near a phone/camera, as indicated by the camera-like reflection across their torso. Their feet are in light-colored slip-on shoes.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors in a room resembling a workspace or store office. In the background, there are desks and a counter area with items lined up along the back wall, including small containers or products. A bright mirror occupies part of the wall, producing a strong glare. Another person stands farther back near the left side of the frame, facing toward the camera area.

Visual Details:
The lighting is bright and slightly washed out due to reflection. Colors include light gray/white walls, dark pants, and light shoes. The floor looks gray and concrete-like, and there is a patterned rug partially visible at the bottom left. The composition is centered on the foreground person, shot at a slight angle with reflections obscuring some details.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
A person is reflected in a mirror while standing with their back to the camera, wearing a light T-shirt and dark pants. Behind them, another person is partially visible in the same indoor room with desks and product-like items along the back wall.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body mirror selfie of a person standing in what appears to be a cafe or retail space. The person is wearing a light-colored t-shirt with a graphic print on the front, loose-fitting black pants, and silver athletic shoes. Their left hand is casually in their pocket, and they are holding a smartphone in their right hand to take the photo.

In the background, reflected in the mirror, is another person wearing a white t-shirt with a graphic that includes rackets and the word "REVERB" printed backward. Behind the counter, there are shelves stocked with various items, possibly coffee beans or merchandise, and a cash register or point-of-sale system. The lighting is bright, with a strong glare from the phone's flash illuminating the scene, creating a slightly washed-out effect. The overall mood is casual and contemporary, with a focus on the subject's outfit. The floor is concrete, with a small patterned rug visible in the lower left corner. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones: white, black, grey, and the warm brown of the counter and shelves.
